description: This file defines a Flutter widget for displaying and managing a list of notes, including search, filtering by tags, navigation to note editing, and deletion functionality.

classes.name: NotesListScreen
classes.description: Main widget displaying the list of notes, search bar, and tag drawer.

classes.name: _NotesListScreenState
classes.description: State class managing the interaction logic for NotesListScreen.

classes.name: _TagsDrawer
classes.description: A widget displaying the list of tags for filtering notes.

classes.name: _NoteCard
classes.description: A widget to display individual note details with options to delete or open for editing.

methods.name: _openEditor
methods.description: Navigates to the NoteEditorScreen to create or edit a note.
